scripts.title: The Discovery
scripts.concept: Pure shock and awe - the moment you turn the corner and meet a 40-foot giant

shots.visual: POV walking through dense forest trail, feet crunching on leaves
Path curves ahead, sunlight filtering through trees
MASSIVE wooden troll emerges from behind trees - 40 feet tall, made of weathered pallets
Wide shot showing scale - tiny person vs giant troll

scripts.caption: When your nature walk turns into a giant discovery 🧌 6 massive trolls hiding at [Garden Name]. Each one 16-50 feet tall. Made from 5 tons of recycled pallets. #ThomasDamboTrolls #TreasureHunt
scripts.cta: Find them all. Link in bio.

scripts.title: The Family Adventure
scripts.concept: Kids leading the treasure hunt, pure joy when they spot each troll

shots.visual: Family with map at garden entrance, kids pointing excitedly
Kids running down trail, parents following with smiles
Child stops, points up - reveal of troll face through trees
shots.camera: Child's eye level to troll reveal

shots.visual: Montage: kids posing with different trolls, reading plaques, collecting stamps
Family group photo with massive troll, all smiling

scripts.caption: 1.26M visitors found the magic at Morton Arboretum. Now it's your turn. 12 massive trolls made from recycled materials. Each with unique stories. Perfect family treasure hunt through nature. 📍 [Garden Name]

scripts.title: Intelligence, Elevated
scripts.concept: The bigger story - art, nature, sustainability converging into something extraordinary

shots.visual: Aerial sunrise over botanical garden, mist rising
Close-up of weathered pallet wood, hands touching texture
Time-lapse style: troll emerging from forest, visitors discovering
Diverse visitors - families, couples, school groups - all amazed
Artist Thomas Dambo working, trolls in natural settings, sustainability message
Golden hour: massive troll silhouette against sky, visitors below
shots.text_overlay:
TROLLS Save the Humans
TROLLS A Field Study

shots.visual: AUROS logo with botanical garden partner logos

scripts.caption: When Danish artist Thomas Dambo transforms 5 tons of discarded pallets into 40-foot forest guardians, magic happens. 1.26M visitors discovered it at Morton Arboretum. Three locations now hosting these sustainable giants.
